evals.prompt: Open https://example.com/login, fill in the email field with 'test@example.com', and submit the form.
evals.expected_output: The agent uses open, snapshot for refs, fill by ref, click by ref, and closes session. Uses snapshot before interaction, uses refs not selectors, mentions session cleanup.
assertions: The agent runs snapshot before attempting to interact
The agent uses element refs (e.g., @e1) not CSS selectors
The agent mentions closing the session when done

evals.prompt: Extract all product names and prices from an e-commerce listing page at https://shop.example.com/products.
evals.expected_output: The agent navigates, snapshots, uses 'get text' or '--json' extraction. Uses data extraction commands, doesn't hardcode refs, re-snapshots if pagination needed.
assertions: The agent uses snapshot or data extraction commands
The agent does not hardcode element refs
The agent mentions re-snapshotting for pagination

evals.prompt: The browser keeps timing out when I try to load a heavy site. How do I fix this?
evals.expected_output: The agent suggests 'wait 2000' instead of 'networkidle', checks for dialogs, mentions analytics/websocket interference.
assertions: The agent identifies 'networkidle' as problematic on dynamic sites
The agent mentions checking for pending dialogs

evals.prompt: Automate filling out a multi-step registration form with 4 pages.
evals.expected_output: The agent uses batch commands for efficiency, re-snapshots between page navigations, warns about ref invalidation after navigation.
assertions: The agent re-snapshots after each navigation/page change
The agent uses batch for 2+ sequential commands
The agent warns that refs are invalidated after navigation

evals.prompt: I need to log into my app and then take a screenshot of the dashboard after login.
evals.expected_output: The agent opens URL, snapshots, identifies login form, fills credentials, clicks submit, waits for load, takes screenshot, and closes session.
assertions: The agent uses correct command sequence: open -> snapshot -> fill -> click -> wait -> screenshot
The agent uses a named session
The agent closes the session at the end
